pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly generates the certificate at this path using openssl.
task.json description, export_result.sh MariaDB query, and verifier.py all require this exact alias.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated X.509 certificate created dynamically by setup_task.sh via openssl at the path /home/ga/Documents/seb_exam_cert.pem. The target alias to be set in the SEB Server during upload is exactly UniversityExamCert2025, which is explicitly checked via MariaDB queries in export_result.sh and enforced by verifier.py.
